---
title: "Publications"
format: html
---

List of first-author publications, with a short highlight, links to their Repos and PDFs:

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(RefManageR)
library(dplyr)

# --- Helpers -------------------------------------------------------------

# Vector-safe cleaner for display text; flattens list-cols and removes braces
clean_text_vec <- function(x) {
  if (is.list(x)) {
    x <- vapply(
      x,
      function(el) {
        if (is.null(el) || length(el) == 0) return("")
        paste(as.character(el), collapse = "; ")
      },
      character(1)
    )
  }
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x)] <- ""
  # Remove double braces and then any leftover single braces for clean display
  x <- gsub("\\{\\{|\\}\\}", "", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("[{}]", "", x, perl = TRUE)
  x
}

# Safe coalesce for two possibly list/char columns
coalesce_chr <- function(a, b) {
  a <- clean_text_vec(a); b <- clean_text_vec(b)
  out <- ifelse(nzchar(a), a, b)
  out[is.na(out)] <- ""
  out
}

# Proper HTML anchor (clickable) with a label
fmt_link <- function(url, label) {
  if (length(url) == 0) return("")
  url <- clean_text_vec(url)
  ifelse(
    nzchar(url),
    sprintf("<a href=\"%s\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\">%s</a>", url, label),
    ""
  )
}

# Build link string showing ONLY: Repo · Article
build_links_repo_article <- function(repo, url) {
  repoL <- fmt_link(repo, "Repo")
  urlL  <- fmt_link(url,  "Article")
  parts <- cbind(repoL, urlL)
  apply(parts, 1, function(row) {
    row <- row[nzchar(row)]
    if (length(row) == 0) "" else paste(row, collapse = " · ")
  })
}

# --- Read BibTeX ----------------------------------------------------------

peer <- ReadBib("data/peer-reviewed-pubs.bib")
peer_df <- as.data.frame(peer, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Bold your name placeholder (then strip any residual braces for display)
peer_df$author <- clean_text_vec(peer_df$author)
peer_df$author <- gsub(
  "SoukhovBold",
  "<strong>Soukhov, A.</strong>",
  peer_df$author,
  perl = TRUE
)

# Build display columns (robust to list-cols and missing fields)
peer_df <- peer_df %>%
  mutate(
    title      = clean_text_vec(title),
    journal    = coalesce_chr(journal, journaltitle),
    highlight  = clean_text_vec(highlight),
    repo_c     = clean_text_vec(repo),
    url_c      = clean_text_vec(url),
    links      = build_links_repo_article(repo_c, url_c),
    year       = suppressWarnings(as.integer(clean_text_vec(year)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(year), desc(title))

# --- Output ---------------------------------------------------------------

years <- sort(unique(peer_df$year[!is.na(peer_df$year)]), decreasing = TRUE)
has_undated <- any(is.na(peer_df$year))

for (yr in years) {
  cat("## ", yr, "\n\n", sep = "")
  pubs <- peer_df %>% filter(year == yr)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pubs))) {
    # Main bullet line
    cat(
      "- **", pubs$title[i], "**  \n",
      "  ", pubs$author[i],
      if (nzchar(pubs$journal[i])) paste0(". *", pubs$journal[i], "*.") else ".",
      if (nzchar(pubs$links[i])) paste0(" ", pubs$links[i]) else "",
      "\n",
      sep = ""
    )
    # Sub-bullet for highlight (only if present)
    if (nzchar(pubs$highlight[i])) {
      cat("  - ", pubs$highlight[i], "\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}

# Undated section at the end (if any)
if (has_undated) {
  cat("## Undated\n\n")
  pubs <- peer_df %>% filter(is.na(year))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pubs))) {
    cat(
      "- **", pubs$title[i], "**  \n",
      "  ", pubs$author[i],
      if (nzchar(pubs$journal[i])) paste0(". *", pubs$journal[i], "*.") else ".",
      if (nzchar(pubs$links[i])) paste0(" ", pubs$links[i]) else "",
      "\n",
      sep = ""
    )
    if (nzchar(pubs$highlight[i])) {
      cat("  - ", pubs$highlight[i], "\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```
